findings.evidence: `TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/JFunction.lean:559` defines `GridDiagram.JO`, `:568` defines `GridDiagram.JX`; the new file only has `GridState.J_pointSet_eq` at `SouthWestCount.lean:87` and the Maslov capstones at `:140`/`:153`.
findings.fix: Add `GridDiagram.JO_eq_card` and `GridDiagram.JX_eq_card` proved from `JO_def`/`JX_def`, `G.OSet = G.O.pointSet`/`G.XSet = G.X.pointSet`, and `GridState.JNum_pointSet_eq`.
findings.issue: The new API gives `GridState.J_pointSet_eq`, but not the parallel column-index formulas for the existing public diagram pairings `GridDiagram.JO` and `GridDiagram.JX`. Users must unfold `JO_def`/`JX_def` and the marking point-set representation to use the advertised count for markings.

findings.evidence: Existing integer grading restatements are `@[simp]` at `TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/GradingInteger.lean:72` and `:85`; the new `maslovOℤ_eq_card` at `SouthWestCount.lean:140` and `maslovXℤ_eq_card` at `:153` have no attribute.
findings.fix: Mark the normal-form column formulas with `@[simp]` where appropriate, or otherwise provide simp-tagged wrapper lemmas for the intended computation path, ensuring they do not conflict with the existing def lemmas.
findings.issue: The capstone column-count formulas for `maslovOℤ` and `maslovXℤ` are the intended computational normal forms, but neither is tagged for automation, so `simp` continues to use the old point-set `maslovOℤ_def`/`maslovXℤ_def` interface instead of the column-index API.

summary: The column-count lemmas cover the new state-state formulas, but the public API is incomplete for existing diagram-level `J` pairings and the intended computational normal forms are not exposed to automation.
